style_name: Gothic Cat Doodle Photo Collage Style
style_summary: A playful photo-illustration collage style combining dramatic real architectural photography with oversized flat cartoon creature overlays, bubbly hand-drawn headline lettering, and loose marker doodles.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: oversized illustrated animal, mascot, creature, or playful character
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: climbing, wrapping around, peeking over, hugging, guarding, or interacting with the architecture
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: small human figure, tiny mascot, sign, portal, object, or campaign prop placed within the architecture
environment_variables.LOCATION: real landmark, cathedral, museum, university building, old theater, city hall, station, or monumental street facade
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: bare trees, sky, stone details, towers, arches, windows, ornament, street texture, and small secondary characters
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: large rounded bubble-letter title integrated across the top of the frame
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: tiny character label, small handwritten note, date, or playful location tag
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: hand-drawn dots, swooshes, sparks, motion curves, circles, or comic marks
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: casual streetwear or simplified cartoon clothing for small secondary figures

style_fidelity_anchors: Preserve the core visual identity: A playful photo-illustration collage style combining dramatic real architectural photography with oversized flat cartoon creature overlays, bubbly hand-drawn headline lettering, and loose marker doodles.
Use BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS to control secondary scene details, textures, signage, props, and environmental cues.
Use a realistic low-angle architectural photograph as the base layer.
Keep the facade detailed, recognizable, and photographic, with dramatic vertical perspective and a saturated teal sky.

Overlay one oversized flat cartoon creature in saturated tomato red or another bold color, with rough black marker contours, simple expressive features, cropped limbs, and small yellow edge highlights.
Add small doodle circles, swooshes, sparks, motion curves, and tiny secondary cartoon figures in windows or doorways for scale contrast.

Avoid watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, app UI, realistic 3D mascot, plush toy texture, full cartoon background, clean corporate layout, dense text, and low-detail architecture.
Keep the same visual genre, density level, and rendering mode across new subjects.

visual_deconstruction.style_category: A playful photo-illustration collage style combining dramatic real architectural photography with oversized flat cartoon creature overlays, bubbly hand-drawn headline lettering, and loose marker doodles.
visual_deconstruction.composition_logic: A reusable poster/image system where the subject, prop, location, text, and accent variables change while the layout grammar remains fixed.
visual_deconstruction.subject_treatment: The subject is driven by SUBJECT and SUBJECT_ACTION, with wardrobe or visual treatment supplied by WARDROBE_STYLE.
visual_deconstruction.background_system: LOCATION and BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS provide the scene, texture, spatial cues, and secondary details without changing the style family.
visual_deconstruction.type_and_graphics: MAIN_TEXT, SECONDARY_TEXT, and ACCENT_SYMBOL control readable text, microcopy, stickers, marks, arrows, bursts, or other graphic accents.
visual_deconstruction.content_boundary: The negative prompt and source_content_to_avoid list prevent direct recreation of source subjects, marks, brands, watermarks, and story premises.

image_treatment.rendering_mode: real architectural photo collage with oversized flat cartoon overlay
image_treatment.finish: finished AI-image prompt output, not a wireframe, SVG, HTML mockup, or raw storyboard note
image_treatment.texture: preserve the material, paper, grain, marker, photographic, or print texture described by the style summary and prompt_template
image_treatment.lighting: keep the lighting behavior implied by the reference style rather than replacing it with a generic cinematic look

composition.layout: Keep the subject hierarchy, crop behavior, framing, and density described by the prompt_template.
composition.subject: Use SUBJECT and SUBJECT_ACTION as the primary visual anchor, scaled and positioned according to the style identity.
composition.scene: Use LOCATION and BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS for setting detail without changing the visual genre.
composition.text: Place MAIN_TEXT and SECONDARY_TEXT as designed graphic elements, not as long paragraphs.

typography.main_text: MAIN_TEXT should be short, legible, and visually integrated with the poster or image system.
typography.secondary_text: SECONDARY_TEXT should read as small caption, label, route note, slogan, or microcopy.
typography.style: Match the typography behavior described by the style summary and prompt_template, including scale, distortion, texture, and placement.

color_palette.palette_behavior: Use the dominant colors, contrast rhythm, and accent-color logic implied by the style summary.
color_palette.background: Keep the background color family consistent with the reference style.
color_palette.accents: Use ACCENT_SYMBOL and graphic marks to carry small high-contrast color moments.

design_rules: Use PRODUCT_OR_PROP as a small secondary element or prop that sharpens the scene idea.
Use LOCATION to define the setting while keeping the style-specific crop and atmosphere.
Use BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS to control secondary scene details, textures, signage, props, and environmental cues.
Use MAIN_TEXT as the primary readable text element.
Use a realistic low-angle architectural photograph as the base layer.
Keep the facade detailed, recognizable, and photographic, with dramatic vertical perspective and a saturated teal sky.

Overlay one oversized flat cartoon creature in saturated tomato red or another bold color, with rough black marker contours, simple expressive features, cropped limbs, and small yellow edge highlights.
do: Replace subjects, props, locations, text, and story details through examples.values.
Keep prompt_template placeholders declared in environment_variables.
Preserve the style_fidelity_anchors when adapting the JSON to a new image request.
Use short, readable text values for MAIN_TEXT and SECONDARY_TEXT.
prompt_template:
Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} image in the "Gothic Cat Doodle Photo Collage" style.

Subject: {SUBJECT}.
Subject action: {SUBJECT_ACTION}.
Prop or small secondary element: {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}.
Location: {LOCATION}.
Background elements: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}.
Main text: {MAIN_TEXT}.
Secondary text: {SECONDARY_TEXT}.
Accent symbol: {ACCENT_SYMBOL}.
Wardrobe or visual styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}.

Use a realistic low-angle architectural photograph as the base layer. Keep the facade detailed, recognizable, and photographic, with dramatic vertical perspective and a saturated teal sky. Overlay one oversized flat cartoon creature in saturated tomato red or another bold color, with rough black marker contours, simple expressive features, cropped limbs, and small yellow edge highlights. Make the creature interact physically with the building, wrapping around arches, towers, windows, or rooflines.

Add huge cream-white bubble graffiti lettering across the top of the frame, with thick cobalt blue outline, warm yellow offset shadow, chalky glow, and imperfect hand-drawn spacing. Add small doodle circles, swooshes, sparks, motion curves, and tiny secondary cartoon figures in windows or doorways for scale contrast.

Avoid watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, app UI, realistic 3D mascot, plush toy texture, full cartoon background, clean corporate layout, dense text, and low-detail architecture.
negative_prompt: watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, app UI, realistic 3D mascot, plush toy texture, glossy fur, full cartoon background, clean corporate layout, luxury editorial fashion, minimalist typography, tiny unreadable text, horror mood, dystopian city, low-detail architecture, abstract backdrop

values.SUBJECT: an oversized flat black cat mascot floating above a stone cathedral stairway
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: leading a tiny parade of doodled bells and ribbon banners
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a miniature brass bell and folded city map
values.LOCATION: a gothic cathedral plaza shot from a low tourist-photo angle
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: arched windows, stone columns, cloudy sky, marker loops, sparkle bursts, and loose black doodle trails
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: white starbursts and crooked arrow marks
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: flat cartoon fur shape with chunky outline and simple sticker-like face

values.SUBJECT: a long flat green dragon mascot curling through a museum entrance photo
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: pointing visitors toward a glowing exhibit sign
values.LOCATION: a grand museum lobby with marble stairs and high arches
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: poster frames, security ropes, doodle smoke puffs, handwritten label scraps, and comic rays
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: rough marker circles and spark icons
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: cartoon creature overlay with saturated scales, round eyes, and rough hand-drawn edges

values.SUBJECT: a giant orange fox doodle jumping over a realistic train station concourse
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: carrying a paper coffee cup while passengers blur below
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a commuter pass and coffee cup
values.LOCATION: a busy old rail station under a vaulted glass roof
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: departure boards, tiled floor reflections, scribbled speed lines, sticker stars, and marker arrows
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: flat mascot body with rough black contour and exaggerated tail

values.SUBJECT: a soft blue flat monster leaning over a real library reading room
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: stacking books into a crooked tower beside a student table
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a pile of library books and a tiny bookmark
values.LOCATION: a historic reading room with tall shelves and warm lamps
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: wood tables, arch windows, loose notebook doodles, speech bubbles, and tiny sparkle marks
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: small moon stickers and looped arrows
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: simple flat creature shape with marker texture and friendly uneven eyes
